description: Both THB cards are explicit Mogis-cult priest depictions: minotaur shamans, both red-black sacrifice-payoff cards, both flavor-attributed directly to Mogis (the god of slaughter), and both deploy the same horned-figure-with-raised-blade iconography that the set's art direction reserves for the Mogis cult specifically. The edge survives the theros-pantheon parent-node addition because it's narrower than the pantheon cohort: this is the Mogis-specific cult-operative pair, structurally analogous to Pitiless Pontiff + Tithe Drinker within the Orzhov node.
